history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward to row 02 column C is safe, and this path can continue around the lava at column C in rows 03 and 04 by going right first. So the best next step is to advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column C facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column D is safe floor, and moving there positions me directly above the goal so I can turn and go down next while avoiding the lava in column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column E is a wall, so I should not move forward. The goal is below me at row 04 column D, so I need to turn right to face downward toward the safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column D is safe floor, and continuing down from there will lead directly to the goal at row 04 column D while avoiding the lava at column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column D is the goal, so moving forward will reach it safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
